Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Fishing giant bass at Camelot Bell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee heads South to Costa Rica and meets up with a wonderful group of friends who are the Reconte Hot Sause owners. The Costa Rican coastline is a perfect playground for this group as they explore traveling on a 50-foot catamaran, surf and fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica Surf and Turf with Riconte Hot Sauce
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace head to Sturgeon Lake in Sunset Country to catch walleyes, pike and lake trout.
Video.grandparentTitle: Linder's Angling Edge | Fishing Ontario’s Sturgeon Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redfish Lodge
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Redfish Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode, we venture out onto Porcupine Lake for some beautiful walleye action with Craig Salmonson from Timmins Angling Adventures. Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditions—but it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Missouri Smackdown
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith the dynamic duo is back for an action packed walleye show out on the bay of green bay
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | EARLY Spring Walleyes Oconto
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim demonstrates crankbait techiques, both shallow and deep, on a world-class smallmouth fishery.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Crankin' St. Clair
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Smallmouth Bass in quantities in this episode. A Thanksgiving tradition.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Smallmouth Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Extremely remote adventures on FishON! this season. Back to our roots with walleye fishing in Northern Ontario
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Northern Ontario Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. We finish the trip in style in part three, catching some more bluefin tuna and giant yellowtail.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In June 1941, Leo Wolfson's life took an unexpected turn when he was drafted into the Army. World War II had arrived, and Leo was stationed on the islands of Hawaii only months after the bombing of Pearl Harbor. Tasked with being a soldier and an entertainer, Leo rose to the occasion on both fronts. Leo's wit and humor are intact, and he shares his stories and personal experience in WWII.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - WWII Veteran Leo Wolfson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Are you ready to learn how you can catch Giant Mississippi River perch! In this episode you'll have everything you need to know to do it yourself. We also took a trip over to Warrior boats to see how that build their boats. Hang onto your hineys!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Monster Pre-spawn Perch - Missisippi River
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Over the last few years, we have been hosting sponsored fishing charters on the El Dorad, out of Long Beach Sport Fishing. Due to Covid 19, the sport boats have new guidelines to follow and only offer limited guests. This turns out to be a massive benefit to the passengers because they have more space for Fishing. On this adventure, we fish on the El Dorado for the first time since the pandemic began and have a blast.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Fishing on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake X Largemouths
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lake X Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with B.A.S.S. Elite Angler Bernie Schultz about antique lure collecting and the new season on the bass master Tournament trail.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Bernie Schultz
Video.title: Episode 1
